name: PyAutoGUI - UI Automation & Image Utils
description: Image/file utilities: 100% functional. UI automation features: Cannot verify in headless environment (expected limitation of PyAutoGUI on Linux). Overall code quality: Good (no syntax errors, proper error handling). Documentation: Clear and comprehensive.
review: PyAutoGUI skill provides image/file utilities that are fully functional and well-documented. However, the primary UI automation features (mouse/keyboard control) cannot be verified in headless Linux environments, which is an expected limitation. Image utilities work correctly.
notes: ⚠️ CONDITIONAL: The skill's primary UI automation features (mouse/keyboard control) are untestable and likely non-functional in OpenClaw's typical headless environment, which is a critical limitation for its stated purpose. While image/file utilities are 100% functional, they represent a secondary use case. Recommended for environments with display server access.
